description:
You are an interior designer preparing a renovation proposal for a client walkthrough. The starter file contains the structural shell of a residential apartment — walls only, no finishes or furnishings. Create a complete, presentation-quality interior design.

Room Design: Define and name 5 rooms: Living Room, Kitchen, Bedroom, Bathroom, and Home Office. Apply a distinct floor texture or color to each room. Additionally, apply wall colors or textures to walls in at least 3 of these rooms to give them a finished look.

Doors: Install at least 5 interior doors to connect the rooms.

Furnishing: Furnish each room appropriately using the built-in catalog, placing at least 30 items total. At least 3 items must be wall-mounted at appropriate height (e.g., shelves at 120cm, a TV unit at 80cm, or a picture frame at 150cm elevation).

Client Presentation: Create a 3D photo rendering of the finished design and save it to ~/Desktop/renovation_render.png. Add at least 4 dimension lines documenting key room measurements.

Save: Save the project as 'apartment_renovation_final.sh3d'.
